topic: Windsurf Wave 10 Guide: Planning Mode & Browser-Aware Cascade

key_points: Official Windsurf blog post introducing Planning Mode
Planning Mode available on all paid plans at no extra cost
Cascade generates a persistent plan.md file that both user and AI can edit
Designed for longer-horizon, multi-step tasks
Plan.md records project goals, planned tasks, and progress status
Planning Mode described as 'completely insane' game-changer for developers
AI now understands entire codebase and all planned work short and long-term
Every Cascade conversation paired with a live Markdown plan
Shared brain between user and AI for tasks, priorities, and goals
Day 2 introduced Windsurf Browser — Chromium-based browser built into editor
Planning Mode enables long-term task management with AI
Combination of Cascade conversations (short-term) and planning files (long-term)
AI can work on long-term tasks without losing context
Developers can intervene and modify the plan at any point
Cascade recognizes plan changes and adjusts its actions accordingly
Windsurf Browser is Wave 10 Day 2 feature — Chromium-based, fully integrated
Cascade tracks and understands open tabs within Windsurf Browser
No more copy-pasting URLs or content for Cascade context
Users can select components, diagrams, text, logs from any page
Revamped rendering engine for faster page loads and smoother interactions
Browser in beta for all self-serve plan users
Wave 10 overview: planning smarter, building faster
Planning Mode transforms productivity for complex, multi-component tasks
Windsurf Browser removes friction between browsing and coding context
o3 model pricing slashed from 10x to 1x credits
All Wave 10 features available for paid tier users

stats.fact: Windsurf has 1M+ active users as of 2026
Windsurf AI writes 70M+ lines of code per day across all users
94% of Windsurf-produced code is written by AI
59% of Fortune 500 companies build with Windsurf
Windsurf was acquired by Cognition AI for approximately $250 million in December 2025
Windsurf ranked #1 in LogRocket AI Dev Tool Power Rankings as of February 2026
o3 model now costs only 1x credits in Wave 10, down from 10x credits previously
Windsurf developer base grew from ~500K (2024) to 1M+ (2025), approximately 20x increase in three years
Windsurf was generating approximately $100M ARR as of April 2025

angles: Planning Mode solves the #1 AI coding frustration: AI forgetting context between sessions — a persistent plan.md bridges that gap
Browser-Aware Cascade eliminates the copy-paste workflow entirely — Cascade can see your tabs and understand what you're viewing without any manual input
Wave 10 positions Windsurf ahead of Cursor for long-horizon tasks: structured plan-execute-verify vs. Cursor's run-ahead-ask-forgiveness approach
o3 pricing dropped 10x in Wave 10, making state-of-the-art reasoning affordable for everyday development tasks
Wave 10 is a two-part rollout: Day 1 = Planning Mode (orchestration layer), Day 2 = Windsurf Browser (context layer) — together they form a complete agentic development loop
For enterprise developers, Planning Mode addresses project governance: transparent, editable AI plans that align with team objectives
Windsurf Browser goes beyond localhost previews — it's a full Chromium browser inside the IDE where Cascade understands your browsing context automatically
outline: H2: What Is Windsurf Wave 10? (Overview of the Two-Part Rollout)
